label: AppleScript • scripted verbatim single literal
query: Set the body of the note 'Draft' to the provided content, exactly.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the {{content}} verbatim path. A canned run_applescript sets the note body via the placeholder; the loop expands it and the mock 'app world' un-escapes it back to the exact bytes. Proves placeholder use, edit classification, and byte-for-byte fidelity through quotes / em dash / newline with no tokens.
